name: Klingelnberg AG
summary: Klingelnberg AG engages in the development, manufacture, and sale of machines for the production of bevel and cylindrical gears, and measuring centers for axially symmetrical objects of various types worldwide. The company offers bevel gear cutting machines, bevel gear grinding machines, bevel gear lapping machines, and bevel gear testing machines, as well as related software, tools and fixtures, and tool management products. It also provides cylindrical gear cutting machines, cylindrical gear grinding machines, machining products, and related software; and precision measuring centers, optical metrology products, tool measurement products, roughness measurement products, and deviation analysis and additional application products, as well as dimension, form, and position measurement products. In addition, the company offers high-precision gear components and after sale services. Klingelnberg AG serves automotive, maritime propulsion, rail, mining/materials handling, oil and gas, agriculture, racing transmission, robot, aviation, and wind power industries, as well as crusher gearboxes, commercial vehicles, industrial gear units, and contract manufacturers. The company was founded in 1863 and is headquartered in Zurich, Switzerland.
